name: personal-agent-dev
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git-lfs ripgrep ffmpeg gcc python3-dev libffi-dev libolm-dev procps && sudo rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'if ! command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/0.11.6/install.sh | sudo env UV_INSTALL_DIR=/usr/local/bin sh; fi && uv venv .venv --python 3.11 && source .venv/bin/activate && uv pip install -e ".[all,dev]" && if [ -f package.json ]; then npm install; fi'
